worldview.value: JAX-accelerated Sequential Monte Carlo framework for protein sequence design and evolutionary studies — benchmarking samplers and mapping fitness landscapes.

eidos.value: Not a protein structure predictor; not a general ML training framework; not a sequence database tool.

s5_policy: All sampler state must be a JAX PyTree (flax.struct.dataclass)
All scoring functions must be vmapped over population_size
All I/O goes through io.py — no direct file writes in sampler loops
Use uv run for all Python execution

primary_function.value: SMC-based protein sequence sampler with OED outer loop for hyperparameter optimization

always_do: uv run ruff check src/ --fix before commit
split JAX PRNG keys before use
never_do: use Python-level mutable state inside jit/vmap/scan
quirks: HMC/NUTS have 4 failing tests (int8→float32 type mismatch in initialization_factory)
Parallel Replica SMC: single-island edge case not yet fixed
NPT ensemble diverges beyond ~10ps — use NVT for production runs
